Compiler's comment: The Karlsruhe group original
result was based on its own 197Au(n,gamma) cross
section by Ratynski and Kaeppeler, Phys.Rev. C37, 595
(1988), EXFOR entry #22099 for neutron beam monitor
that later was proven as deficient.
Kaeppeler and Reifarth comment: Cross section value in
entry 14237 is renormalized for new gold cross section.
